user.title: Grid Tariff Peak Shaver
user.description: Point the integration at your HAN power sensor (instantaneous watts). Energy, smoothing, projection and the shed/restore engine are all handled internally.

data.show_all_sensors: My sensor isn't listed (show all sensors)

pick_all.title: Select power sensor
pick_all.description: Showing every sensor entity (no power device-class filter). Pick the one reporting instantaneous power in watts.

error.no_sensor: Select a power sensor, or tick 'show all sensors' to broaden the list.

data.min_toggle_seconds: Minimum time between toggling a device (s)
